claim: MCP apps use a sandboxed iframe pattern where servers return both data and HTML UI resources that are fetched and rendered in isolation to prevent external API calls or system interference
actionable: When building MCP apps, bundle HTML/JS UI resources and return them as MCP resources that render in sandboxed iframes for security
source_title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub

claim: MCP apps enable bidirectional communication where the UI can call back to the server for fresh data, updating the interface in real-time based on user interactions
actionable: Design MCP apps with client-server communication patterns to enable responsive, interactive experiences within chat
source_title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub

claim: Early adopters of MCP apps include Shopify for checkout flows, Excalidraw for interactive diagrams, and Figma for on-the-fly component generation
actionable: Review existing MCP app implementations from Shopify, Excalidraw, and Figma to understand design patterns for different domains
source_title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub

claim: MCP apps can be built with React, Vue, Svelte, or vanilla JavaScript, and the mechanism works by servers returning tool results with UI resource references
actionable: Choose your UI framework based on preference and complexity needs when building MCP apps
source_title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps — Marlene Mhangami & Liam Hampton, GitHub
